card.name: Ranni the Witch
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. Once during each of your turns, you may cast an instant or sorcery spell from your graveyard by sacrificing another creature in addition to paying that spell's other costs. If a spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Marika, God-Queen
card.text: Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, copy it. The copy is a Saga in addition to its other types and has "r{3}— You gain 1 life." You may choose new targets for the copy. (As that token enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Whenever Marika attacks, you may have her name become Radagon of the Golden Order. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on him for each enchantment you control. Do this only once.

card.name: Starscourge Radahn
card.text: Trample When Starscourge Radahn enters or whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a tapped colorless artifact token named Meteorite with "When this token enters, it deals 2 damage to any target" and "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Godwyn's Fall
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature. {1}{B}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this enchantment: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Rellana's Cameo
card.text: Draw a card. As long as you've cast two or more noncreature spells this turn, this card has flashback {U}.

card.name: Carian Retaliation
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. Create a Shard token.

card.name: Rennala of Caria
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Wizard creature token. Final form {4}{GW}{U} (You may cast a copy of this from the battlefield or your graveyard by exiling it and paying the final form cost. The copy enters transformed.) --- (Back): Rennala, Queen of the Moon

card.name: Rennala, Queen of the Moon
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create X 1/1 blue Wizard creature tokens, where X is that spell's mana value. --- (Front): Rennala of Caria

card.name: Blaidd, Loyal Hound
card.text: Trample, haste Prowess When Blaidd enters, you may exile target instant or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less from a graveyard. Copy it. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Bloodhound Knight
card.text: This creature can't block. Whenever you discard this card or discard another card, you may cast this card from your graveyard.

card.name: Dearest Nanaya
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. Whenever a creature you control enters, if mana from Dearest Nanaya was spent to cast it, you may discard a card. If you do, until end of turn, that creature gains haste and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: Miquella's Sacrifice
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it's a Saga enchantment in addition to its other types and has "r{3} — Scry 2." (As that token enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)

card.name: Torrent, Spectral Steed
card.text: Whenever you cast a legendary spell, Torrent gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Secret Away
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a creature with mana value 4 or less. Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sir Ansbach
card.text: When Sir Ansbach enters, you may have each player sacrifice a creature. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you draw a card and lose 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Gideon Ofnir, All Knowing
card.text: Flash Whenever an opponent searches their library, create a Shard token. Whenever you draw a card other than the first one you draw during each of your draw steps, draw an additional card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: White Mask Varre
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If that creature was legendary, create a Blood token.

card.name: War with Liurnia
card.text: Choose one — • Draw two cards. • War with Liurnia deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Radagon, King Consort
card.text: Trample When Radagon dies, if he was a creature, return him to the battlefield. He's a legendary Equipment artifact named Sacred Relic Sword with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +X/+X and has trample, where X is the total mana value of legendary permanents you control."

card.name: Vyke's Torment
card.text: Cascade As long as you have no cards in hand and this card is in your graveyard, it has flashback {B}{R}.

card.name: Spoken Echoes
card.text: Return up to one target card from your graveyard to your hand. You may put a permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Soldier of Godrick
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Roderika and Hewg
card.text: When Roderika and Hewg enter, you may search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Whenever an Equipment you control enters, create a 1/1 blue Spirit creature token. Then you may pay {1}. If you do, attach that Equipment to that token.

card.name: Rennala's Studies
card.text: If it's your turn, you get an additional upkeep step and an additional draw step after this phase, followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Millicent's Journey
card.text: Discard your hand, then draw a card for each attacking creature you control.

card.name: Hyetta, Blind Maiden
card.text: Whenever you discard a card, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card for as long as you control Hyetta. At the beginning of your end step, for each card exiled with Hyetta, put it into your graveyard unless you pay 1 life.

card.name: Founding Rain of Stars
card.text: Reveal the top ten cards of your library. For each card type, you may put a card of that type from among the revealed cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Metyr, Mother of Fingers
card.text: Menace When Metyr enters, exile each opponent's graveyard. Create a 1/2 black Finger Spider creature token for each nonland card exiled this way. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a card exiled with Metyr and you may spend mana of any type to cast it.

card.name: Seeking the Crosses
card.text: If you would gain life, you gain that much life plus 1 instead. At the beginning of your end step, if you gained 4 or more life this turn, exile up to one target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Ancestor Spirit
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, create a tapped Ancient Tomb token.

card.name: Ritual Ascension
card.text: Converge — Search your library for a black card with mana value less than or equal to the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell, exile that card, then shuffle. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Bathed in Gold
card.text: Cascade, cascade, cascade

card.name: Fleeting Microcosm
card.text: Return target nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand. You may return an enchantment you control to its owner's hand.
